sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76285" key="o)ya/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψ-άομαι</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄψον</etym>) <sense id="n76285.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat as</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄψον, τι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.668b</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
